T-MSIS Analytic File Pharmacy

 View Data Documentation

The Medicaid and CHIP T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) Pharmacy (RX) file includes records of filled prescriptions. Records include fee-for-service (FFS) claims, managed care encounters and
